excerpt: He invited the disobedient group and called them to the truth, forbidding them from disobeying Allah. Yet all of them denied it and were arrogant, which caused their souls to become distressed.
source_location_hint: discussions of emanation and disobedience in the intelligible realm

excerpt: By the justice of Allah, Asher was commanded to release them, for he had become their chief by virtue of having caused them to stray. The position of the First Intellect in the world of Abdāʾ corresponds to the position that Ashir holds for those in the world of density.
source_location_hint: discussions of hierarchies and divine justice in creation

excerpt: Their mistake was but a fleeting delay. In Arabic, this is called the blink of an eyelid, a most slight transgression. And the term means error like the blink of an eye, or a particle of error.
source_authority: Kirmani on the doctrine of the Imamate
source_location_hint: analysis of subtle distinctions in spiritual states

excerpt: The Prophet's tradition indicates in its deepest sense that the best of all matters is their middle course.
source_location_hint: discussions of the mean and balance in creation

excerpt: The World of Life has been designated by several other names: Tamour, the Spiritual Kaaba, the Center, the Gate of the Holy World, the Spiritual Heart, and the World of the Veiled.

He holds the same station in the material world as the First Intellect holds in the world of origin. He became the place where the rays of the First Intellect fell, and in every age of the natural world, he became the radiant light shining upon the Prophet, the Imam, and their supporter.
On the basis of their mutual perception of giving and receiving, the ranks and hierarchies were established among them.
Those who attained the highest rank had their sight established through the attention of strength and power in Ashraf's intention-world.
The Kaaba became the center of the gaze of all these Imams. That is why all these Imams are called in this world the Imams of the Muhammadan Circle.
If the Eye had not gone to the sight of the Veil of Ali, and if the mīm had not reached the sight of the Veil of Muhammad, I would never have read the Kalima.
source_location_hint: taʾwīl of the Testimony of Faith

excerpt: All the Imams and the Pure Ones are established in the stations of the Kalmam. Since they had accepted the summons before they became material, the justice of Allah does not permit them to be sent into this world, which is the abode of Allah's wrath. Yet all of these Kalmam make an impression in this material world through a veil.
source_location_hint: the doctrine of veiling and manifestation

excerpt: Those who became veils for the sake of the Prophet existed in the time of the Prophet and became veils to save the self of the Prophet, bearing pain themselves to protect their master.
source_location_hint: the sacrifice of the veils for the Prophet

excerpt: The Pillar of Light is transmitted from the Gate to the Proof, from the Proof to the Summoner, from the Summoner to the Permission-Giver, from the Permission-Giver to the Believers, and from the Believers to the Respondents while they take the Noble Covenant.
This light is called by another name: the Divine Power. This light does not fall upon our bodies, but upon our Rational Soul.
source_authority: Nasir-i Khusraw on the face of faith
